[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Tybert Capucot''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer onboard the Imperial customs ship, [[Assessor (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Assessor'']], that was in service around [[The Pit/Legends|The Pit]] shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Biography==
Capucot and a heavily armed boarding party boarded the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and searched the ship for spice. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was running the spice for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] from [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], but actually jettisoned the spice in fear that he and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] would be arrested and the ''Millennium Falcon'' impounded. He also had a group of children he had rescued from the [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] spice colonies after the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raid. Capucot and the search team failed to find any spice. However, due to Solo's heroism, Capucot decided to escort him to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] where he would drop the children off. This kept Han from returning to the coordinates where he had jettisoned the spice in order to pick it up.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' author [[A. C. Crispin]] auctioned off the name of Capucot's character when writing the novel, the proceeds going to the Science Fiction and Fantasy Writers of America Emergency Fund, an insurance fund for freelance writers. Two fans pooled their money to win the auction, and Crispin created the name Tybert Capucot as a takeoff of both their names.<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/29981361|board=Literature|thread=Would you like to be in a Star Wars novel?|user=[[A. C. Crispin|accrispin]]|date=2009-04-21|time=4:59 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20170311223741/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/would-you-like-to-be-in-a-star-wars-novel.29962797/page-2}}</ref>
